raw.message: Play fun games to test your brain skills including problem solving, memory, attention and language. Play now to compare your brain score with your friends! 🚀

hook.summary: A hand fails to fit geometric shapes into a silhouette under a high-IQ challenge headline.
hook.visual_action: A hand drags a blue circle and a pink triangle into a grey outline, triggering red 'X' symbols.
hook.text_overlay: ONLY PEOPLE WITH HIGH IQ CAN SOLVE THIS!

scene_flow: Hand attempts to place a blue circle and pink triangle into the grey outline, failing both times.
Hand tries to fit an orange shape and a purple square, failing again with red 'X' markers.
Hand makes a final attempt with a teal shape, resulting in another failure.
A large red 'FAIL' banner appears over the screen as the hand gives up.
on_screen_text: ONLY PEOPLE WITH HIGH IQ CAN SOLVE THIS!
audience_proxy: Adults interested in brain training and IQ challenges who are motivated by competitive or provocative claims.
